   273→rbgm_payor_refresh() {
   274→  zrbgm_sentinel
   275→
   276→  buc_doc_brief "Display the manual Payor OAuth credential installation/refresh procedure"
   277→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   278→
   279→  zrbgm_s1     "Manual Payor OAuth Credential Installation/Refresh Procedure"
   280→  zrbgm_d      "Use this for initial credential setup after payor establishment or to refresh expired/compromised credentials."
   281→  zrbgm_d      "Testing mode refresh tokens expire after 6 months of non-use."
   282→  zrbgm_e
   283→  zrbgm_s2     "When to use this procedure:"
   284→  zrbgm_d      "  - Initial setup after running rbgm_payor_establish"
   285→  zrbgm_d      "  - Payor operations return 401/403 errors"
   286→  zrbgm_d      "  - OAuth client secret compromised"
   287→  zrbgm_d      "  - 6+ months since last Payor operation"
   288→  zrbgm_e
   289→  zrbgm_s2     "1. Obtain OAuth Credentials:"
   290→  zrbgm_d      "   For initial setup:"
   291→  zrbgm_d      "      - Use JSON file downloaded during rbgm_payor_establish"
   292→  zrbgm_d      "   For refresh/renewal:"
   293→  zrbgm_dld    "      - Go to: " "Credentials for Payor Project" "https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
   294→  zrbgm_dm     "      - Find existing " "${RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME}" " OAuth client"
   295→  zrbgm_d      "      - Click the OAuth client name to open details"
   296→  zrbgm_d      "      - To rotate secret if compromised:"
   297→  zrbgm_dm     "        a. Click " "+ Add secret"
   298→  zrbgm_d      "        b. Click the download icon next to the NEW secret"
   299→  zrbgm_dm     "           Browser downloads: " "client_secret_[id].apps.googleusercontent.com.json"
   300→  zrbgm_dmd    "        c. Click " "Disable" " on the secret with the older creation date"
   301→  zrbgm_d      "        d. Click the trash icon to delete that disabled secret"
   302→  zrbgm_e
   303→  zrbgm_s2     "2. Install/Refresh OAuth Credentials:"
   304→  zrbgm_d      "   Run the payor install command with the downloaded JSON:"
   305→  zrbgm_dc     "      " "rbgp_payor_install ~/Downloads/client_secret_*.json"
   306→  zrbgm_d      "   This will:"
   307→  zrbgm_d      "   - Guide you through OAuth authorization flow"
   308→  zrbgm_d      "   - Store secure credentials in ~/.rbw/rbro.env"
   309→  zrbgm_d      "   - Update RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID in rbrp.env"
   310→  zrbgm_d      "   - Test the authentication"
   311→  zrbgm_d      "   - Initialize depot tracking"
   312→  zrbgm_d      "   - Reset the 6-month expiration timer"
   313→  zrbgm_e
   314→  zrbgm_s2     "3. Verify Installation:"
   315→  zrbgm_d      "   Test with a simple operation:"
   316→  zrbgm_dc     "      " "rbgp_depot_list"
   317→  zrbgm_d      "   Should display current depots without authentication errors."
   318→  zrbgm_e
   319→  zrbgm_d      "Prevention: Run any Payor operation monthly to prevent expiration."
   320→
   321→  buc_success "OAuth credential installation/refresh procedure displayed"
   322→}

    32→
    33→  # Set defaults for all fields (validate enforces required-ness)

    39→  RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS="${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS:-}"
    40→  RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION="${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION:-}"
    41→  RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN="${RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN:-}"
    42→  RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY="${RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY:-}"
    43→  RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID="${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID:-}"
    44→  RBRR_GCP_REGION="${RBRR_GCP_REGION:-}"
    45→  RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY="${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY:-}"
    46→  RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE="${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE:-}"
    47→  RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT="${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT:-}"
    48→  RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS="${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS:-}"
    49→  RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE="${RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE:-}"
    50→  RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE="${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE:-}"
    51→  RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE="${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE:-}"
    52→  RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF="${RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF:-}"
    53→  RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF="${RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF:-}"
    54→  RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF="${RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF:-}"
    55→  RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF="${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF:-}"
    56→  RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF="${RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF:-}"
    57→  RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF="${RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF:-}"
    58→  RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF="${RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF:-}"
    59→  RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF="${RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF:-}"
    60→
    61→  # Detect unexpected RBRR_ variables
    62→  local z_known="RBRR_VESSEL_DIR RBRR_DNS_SERVER RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID RBRR_GCP_REGION RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF"
    63→  ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED=()
    64→  local z_var
    65→  for z_var in $(compgen -v RBRR_); do
    66→    case " ${z_known} " in
    67→      *" ${z_var} "*) : ;;
    68→      *) ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED+=("${z_var}") ;;
    69→    esac
    70→  done
    71→
    72→  # Build rollup of all RBRR_ variables for passing to scripts/containers
    73→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP=""
    74→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_VESSEL_DIR='${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}' "
    75→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_DNS_SERVER='${RBRR_DNS_SERVER}' "
    76→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME='${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}' "
    77→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME='${RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME}' "
    78→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ='${RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ}' "
    79→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS='${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS}' "
    80→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION='${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}' "
    81→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN='${RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN}' "
    82→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY='${RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY}' "
    83→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID='${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}' "
    84→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCP_REGION='${RBRR_GCP_REGION}' "
    85→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY='${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}' "
    86→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE='${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}' "
    87→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT='${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}' "
    88→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE='${RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE}' "
    89→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE='${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}' "
    90→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE='${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}' "
    91→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF}' "
    92→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF}' "

    94→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}' "

    97→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF}' "

    99→
   100→  # Build docker env args array for container injection
   101→  # Usage: docker run "${ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" ...
   102→  # Currently only RBRR_DNS_SERVER is needed by sentry; add others as needed
   103→  ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV=()
   104→  ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRR_DNS_SERVER=${RBRR_DNS_SERVER}")

   109→zrbrr_sentinel() {
   110→  test "${ZRBRR_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbrr not kindled - call zrbrr_broach first"
   111→}
   112→
   113→# Validate RBRR variables via buv_env_* (dies on first error)
   114→# Prerequisite: broach must have been called; buv_validation.sh must be sourced
   115→zrbrr_validate_fields() {
   116→  zrbrr_sentinel
   117→
   118→  # Die on unexpected variables
   119→  if test ${#ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED[@]} -gt 0; then
   120→    buc_die "Unexpected RBRR_ variables: ${ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED[*]}"
   121→  fi
   122→
   123→  # Container Registry Configuration
   124→  buv_env_string      RBRR_VESSEL_DIR              1    255
   125→  buv_env_ipv4        RBRR_DNS_SERVER
   126→
   127→  # Machine Configuration
   128→  buv_env_xname       RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME     1     64
   129→  buv_env_xname       RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME     1     64
   130→  buv_env_string      RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ            1    512
   131→  buv_env_string      RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS      1    512
   132→  buv_env_string      RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION   1     16
   133→  buv_env_fqin        RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN   1    256
   134→  buv_env_string      RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY         1    128
   135→  buv_env_gname       RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID          6     63
   136→  buv_env_gname       RBRR_GCP_REGION              1     32
   137→
   138→  # Google Artifact Registry Configuration
   139→  buv_env_gname       RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY          1     63
   140→
   141→  # Google Cloud Build Configuration
   142→  buv_env_string      RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE        3     64
   143→  buv_env_string      RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT             2     10
   144→
   145→  # Service Account Configuration Files
   146→  buv_env_string      RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE         1    512
   147→  buv_env_string      RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE     1    512
   148→  buv_env_string      RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE      1    512
   149→
   150→  # GCB image pins (digest-pinned)
   151→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF
   152→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF
   153→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF
   154→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF
   155→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF
   156→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF
   157→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF
   158→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF
   159→
   160→  # Validate directories exist
   161→  buv_dir_exists "${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}"
   162→
   163→  # Validate manifest platforms format (space-separated identifiers)
   164→  local z_platform=""
   165→  for z_platform in ${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS}; do
   166→    if ! printf '%s' "${z_platform}" | grep -q '^[a-z0-9_]\+$'; then
   167→      buc_warn "Invalid platform format in RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS: ${z_platform}"
   168→      buc_step "Expected format: lowercase alphanumeric with underscores"
   169→      buc_die "Invalid RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS"
   170→    fi
   171→  done
   172→
   173→  # Validate timeout format (number followed by 's' for seconds)
   174→  if ! printf '%s' "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" | grep -q '^[0-9]\+s$'; then
   175→    buc_warn "Invalid RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT format: ${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}"
   176→    buc_step "Expected format: number followed by 's' (e.g., 1200s)"
   177→    buc_die "Invalid RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT"
   178→  fi
   179→
   180→  # Validate Podman version format (e.g., 5.5 or 5.5.1)
   181→  if ! printf '%s' "${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}" | grep -q '^[0-9]\+\.[0-9]\+\(\.[0-9]\+\)\?$'; then
   182→    buc_warn "Invalid RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION format: ${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}"
   183→    buc_step "Expected format: semantic version like 5.5 or 5.5.1"
   184→    buc_die "Invalid RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION"
   185→  fi
   186→}
   187→
   188→######################################################################
   189→# Public Functions (rbrr_*)
   190→
   191→# Load RBRR regime
   192→# Usage: rbrr_load
   193→# Uses RBCC_RBRR_FILE to locate rbrr_RecipeBottleRegimeRepo.sh, verifies exists, sources, broaches, and validates
   194→rbrr_load() {
   195→  local z_rbrr_file="${RBCC_RBRR_FILE}"
   196→  test -f "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "RBRR config not found: ${z_rbrr_file}"
   197→
   198→  source "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source RBRR config: ${z_rbrr_file}"
   199→  zrbrr_broach
   200→  zrbrr_validate_fields
   201→}

    28→## Per-Regime Variable Listings

    47→**Note:** `BURC_PROJECT_ROOT` and `BURC_MANAGED_KITS` are present in the assignment file but not validated by the kindle function. They are consumed downstream.

   114→### 5. RBRN_ (Regime Nameplate)
   115→

This is a more recent refactoring that collapsed 5 boolean flags into 2 mode enums plus the existing ENTRY_MODE.

   173→

   184→
   185→### 9. RBRS_ (Regime Station)
   186→
   187→Developer workstation config. Validated by `rbrs_regime.sh:zrbrs_kindle()`.
   188→
   189→| Variable | Validator Type | Notes |

   193→| RBRS_VM_PLATFORM | string[1,64] | VM platform identifier |
   194→
   195→**Total: 3 variables.**
   196→
   197→### 10. RBRV_ (Regime Vessel)
   198→
   199→Per-vessel build/bind config. Validated by `rbrv_regime.sh:zrbrv_kindle()`.
   200→
   201→| Variable | Validator Type | Conditionality |
   202→|----------|---------------|----------------|
   203→| RBRV_SIGIL | xname[1,64] | Required (must match directory name) |
   204→| RBRV_DESCRIPTION | string[0,512] | Optional |
   205→| RBRV_BIND_IMAGE | fqin[1,512] | When binding (copying from registry) |
   206→| RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE | string[1,512] | When conjuring (building from source) |
   207→| RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT | string[1,512] | When conjuring |
   208→| RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS | string[1,512] | When conjuring |

   214→
   215→### 11. RBRA_ (Credential Format)
   216→
   217→Service account credential files sourced at runtime. **Not a regime** in the CRR sense -- no validator, no spec doc. A file format convention.
   218→
   219→| Variable | Notes |
   220→|----------|-------|
   221→| RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL | Service account email |
   222→| RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY | RSA private key (PEM) |
   223→| RBRA_PROJECT_ID | GCP project ID |
   224→| RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC | Token lifetime (hardcoded 1800) |
   225→
   226→**Written by:** `rbgp_Payor.sh` (governor SA), `rbgg_Governor.sh` (retriever/director SAs)
   227→**Consumed by:** `rbgo_OAuth.sh` (token generation)
   228→**Referenced via:** `RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE`, `RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE`, `RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE`
   229→
   230→---
   231→
   232→## Cross-Regime Dependency Map
   233→
   234→```
   235→BURC ─── sources ──► BURS  (via BURC_STATION_FILE path)
   236→  │
   237→  └─── feeds ──► BURD  (dispatch reads BURC, creates BURD_ runtime vars)
   238→
   239→RBRR ─── references ──► RBRA  (3 file paths: GOVERNOR, RETRIEVER, DIRECTOR)
   240→  │
   241→  └─── depends on ──► RBGC  (Constants, for naming patterns)
   242→
   243→RBRP ─── depends on ──► RBGC  (zrbgc_sentinel required before kindle)
   244→
   245→RBRN ─── independent  (no cross-regime validator dependencies)
   246→RBRE ─── independent
   247→RBRG ─── independent
   248→RBRS ─── independent
   249→RBRV ─── independent
   250→
   251→RBRA ─── written by ──► RBGP (Payor), RBGG (Governor)
   252→     ─── consumed by ──► RBGO (OAuth)
   253→     ─── paths in ──► RBRR (3 path variables)
   254→```
   255→
   256→### Kindle Order (enforced by sentinel calls)
   257→
   258→1. **RBGC** (Constants) -- must be first, depended on by RBRP
   259→2. **BURC** -- infrastructure, enables BURS
   260→3. **BURS** -- station, enables BUD logging
   261→4. **RBRR** -- repo config, enables RBRA file access
   262→5. **RBRP** -- payor config (needs RBGC)
   263→6. All others are independent and can kindle in any order
   264→
   265→---
   266→
   267→## Naming Convention Analysis (per CRR Framework)
   268→
   269→### CRR Compliance Assessment
   270→
   271→| Regime | Has Prefix | Has Validator | Has Assignment | Has Spec Doc | Has Glossary | CRR Compliant |
   272→|--------|-----------|---------------|----------------|-------------|-------------|---------------|
   273→| BURC_ | Yes | Yes | Yes | No | No | Partial |
   274→| BURS_ | Yes | Yes | Yes (external) | No | No | Partial |
   275→| BURD_ | Yes | No (runtime) | No | No | No | N/A (not a regime) |
   276→| RBRR_ | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | No | Mostly |
   277→| RBRN_ | Yes | Yes | Yes (3 files) | Yes | No | Mostly |
   278→| RBRP_ | Yes | Yes | Yes | No | No | Partial |
   279→| RBRE_ | Yes | Yes | No (external) | No | No | Partial |
   280→| RBRG_ | Yes | Yes | No (external) | No | No | Partial |
   281→| RBRS_ | Yes | Yes | No (external) | No | No | Partial |
   282→| RBRV_ | Yes | Yes | Yes (6 files) | No | No | Partial |
   283→| RBRA_ | Yes | No | N/A | No | No | N/A (not a regime) |
   284→
   285→### Prefix Naming Patterns
   286→
   287→All regimes follow the mint discipline:
   288→- **BUK domain:** `BU` + one-char suffix: `BURC`, `BURS`, `BUD`
   289→- **RBW domain:** `RBR` + one-char suffix: `RBRR`, `RBRN`, `RBRP`, `RBRE`, `RBRG`, `RBRS`, `RBRV`, `RBRA`
   290→
   291→Terminal exclusivity is maintained -- no prefix is both a leaf and a parent.
   292→
   293→### Validator Pattern Consistency
   294→
   295→All validators follow a uniform structure:
   296→1. Copyright header
   297→2. `set -euo pipefail`
   298→3. Multiple inclusion guard (`Z{PREFIX}_SOURCED`)
   299→4. `z{prefix}_kindle()` function with `Z{PREFIX}_KINDLED` guard
   300→5. Uses `buv_env_*` validation functions (from BUK validation utilities)
   301→6. `z{prefix}_sentinel()` function for downstream callers
   302→7. Rollup construction (RBRN, RBRV only)
   303→
   304→---
   305→
   306→## Gap Analysis
   307→
   308→### Missing Spec Documents (5 regimes)
   309→
   310→| Regime | Impact | Recommendation |
   311→|--------|--------|----------------|
   312→| BURC_ | Medium | Create `BURC-RegimeConfiguration.adoc` -- well-defined scope, 10 variables |
   313→| RBRP_ | Low | Create `RBRP-RegimePayor.adoc` -- small (3 vars), but payor setup is critical path |
   314→| RBRE_ | Low | External credentials; spec may not add value |
   315→| RBRG_ | Low | External credentials; spec may not add value |
   316→| RBRS_ | Low | Create `RBRS-RegimeStation.adoc` -- small but documents workstation requirements |
   317→
   318→### Missing Glossary Documents (all regimes)
   319→
   320→No regime has a CRR-compliant `{crg_glossary_adoc}`. RBRN and RBRR have spec docs that serve some of this purpose, but formal glossary files with `tag::mapping-section[]` and linked term definitions don't exist.
   321→
   322→### Missing Service Makefiles (all regimes)
   323→
   324→CRR defines `{crg_service_mk}` with validation and render targets. No regime has one -- all validation is done via bash validators called at kindle time. This is a design divergence: the project uses bash-first validation rather than make-based validation.
   325→
   326→### Validators Without Full Type Coverage
   327→
   328→- RBRP: Uses custom regex validation instead of `buv_env_*` for all 3 variables
   329→- RBRR: Uses `buv_env_gname` and `buv_env_odref` which aren't in CRR's type system (project extensions)
   330→- BUD: No validation at all (runtime-only)
   331→
   332→### RBRV Mode Semantics
   333→
   334→RBRV uses a mutual-presence pattern (bind vs conjure) rather than an explicit mode enum. Both can be set simultaneously (the validator allows it). This differs from RBRN's explicit `_MODE` enum pattern. Consider whether RBRV should have an explicit `RBRV_MODE` variable (`bind`/`conjure`/`both`).
   335→
   336→### RBRN Spec-Validator Drift
   337→
   338→The RBRN spec doc still documents boolean flags (`ENTRY_ENABLED`, `DNS_ENABLED`, `ACCESS_ENABLED`, `DNS_GLOBAL`, `ACCESS_GLOBAL`) but the validator now uses tri-state `_MODE` enums. The spec needs updating to match the current validator.
   339→
   340→### Credential Regime Gap
   341→
   342→RBRA is used consistently (4 variables, written by 2 producers, consumed by 1 consumer) but has no validator. Since credential files are high-value targets, a validator would catch format errors early. Consider creating `rbra_regime.sh`.
   343→
   344→---
   345→
   346→## Summary Statistics
   347→
   348→| Metric | Count |
   349→|--------|-------|
   350→| Total regime prefixes | 11 (9 declared + BUD runtime + RBRA format) |
   351→| Declared regimes with validators | 9 |
   352→| Regimes with spec documents | 2 (RBRR, RBRN) |
   353→| Regimes with glossary documents | 0 |
   354→| Regimes with service makefiles | 0 |
   355→| Total declared variables | ~83 (across all regimes) |
   356→| Git-tracked assignment files | ~12 (1 BURC + 1 RBRR + 3 RBRN + 1 RBRP + 6 RBRV) |
   357→| External (not-in-git) assignment files | ~4 (1 BURS + RBRE + RBRG + RBRS) |
   358→| RBRA credential files | 3 (governor, retriever, director) |
